posts.author: shay.butran (shay butran)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

  1. i try to send a simple request, i want to get all the items changed since date 01/12/23.
    how can i write it?
    if i write date4 intead of last_updated its working fine.
    i tried this but i get an error:

query {
boards (ids:xxxxxxxxx) {
items_page (limit: 100, query_params: {rules: {column_id: “last_updated”, compare_value: [“2023-12-01”, “2024-12-31”], operator:between}}) {
cursor
items {
id
name
updated_at
column_values {
id
text
}
group {
title
id
color
}
}
}
}
}

  1. Where can i see all the possible operators?
    if i want to take all the items changed since some date (and not between dates as i wrote before).

posts.author: joseph.monday (Joseph Laux)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi Shay,

For your requests:

  1. Is “Last_updated” the title of the column? If so, this is different from the column ID. I don’t have insight into your board, but date4 does appear to be a valid naming of a column_id, which is why this works.
  2. You can find out all the operators in our documentation here!

Hope this helps with your request!

Best,
Joseph
